summary: Retried the exact backend validation outside the sandbox after a Mockito Byte Buddy attach failure; no backend code repair was needed and mvn test passed.
Updated frontend TypeScript configs to Bundler module resolution and added src/vite-env.d.ts; reran npm run build successfully.
Repaired Playwright report paths and the ambiguous task completion selector, then reran the exact E2E command with browser-launch permissions successfully.
